results.title: Loova AI: Your AI Creative Studio
results.content:
Anbang Xu
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang Yes, that’s exactly what we’re building. The goal is for the agent to act like a director and marketing expert, helping you turn a rough idea into a high-quality video quickly and easily.

Milo
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang That’s exactly what we want to make easier.

You shouldn’t need to know how to write a script, plan shots, or choose the right tools. With Loova, you can start from a rough creative goal, and the agent will turn it into a story structure, scenes, visuals, and a video workflow automatically.

You can still jump in and adjust things, but the heavy lifting should be handled by the agent. [...] That frustration is what led us to build Loova Agents.

We wanted to create something that behaves more like a creative director than just another AI generator.   
With Loova Agents, the goal is simple:

understand the intent behind your idea

plan scenes before generation

generate visuals and BGM together

keep the whole project inside one infinite canvas

let creators shape stories visually, not tab by tab

People are already using it for product ads, AI short films, talking avatar videos, UGC style content, and more.

We’re still very early. Still learning every day. Still building with the community.

If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts. A lot of what we build next will come directly from user feedback. Here is a quick link to explore: 

SomitraSR from Timidlly [...] Loova AI

results.content:
#### What needs improvement

censorship (2)bait and switch (2)

Report

Constance Tong

Loova AI

Loova AI

Hi Tony, we’re sorry it feels like the goalposts have been moved. Let me clarify exactly what was included in the original AppSumo deal and how things stand today.

What the deal covered

● Unlimited lip-sync videos with the “classic” avatar pipeline (now called AvatarLite).

● A fixed allotment of Non-Video Credits (now called Motion Credits), designed for premium animation features.

Why Veo 3 is BYOK [...] Gold If you’re running campaigns and want 10, 50, or 100 variations of a video… this tool handles it like a pro. Great for agencies, ecommerce, or anyone serious about split testing and localization. 4. Talking Photos, Podcast-to-Video, Multilingual Magic It’s got a bag full of tricks — animating still photos into speaking videos, auto-translating your content into 90+ languages, converting podcasts into snackable video clips. It’s genuinely versatile. 🚀 What’s Working Well Speed: You can go from script to polished video in minutes. It drastically cuts the turnaround time for video creation. Ease of use: The UI is beginner-friendly but has depth if you want to customize. Value: For the amount of content you can generate, especially if you're on a lifetime or generous plan, it's a [...] #### What's great

AI avatars (9)video templates (1)custom avatars (6)voice cloning (3)URL-to-video (3)photo avatar (2)

Report

 11 views

•1 review

Already a great tool and keeps improving at a fast pace. The French clone in French is still not as amazing as in other languages but it's already quite good and I'm sure it will be perfect soon. The build-in voices are very good and there's a lot of choice. There are many great avatars available in the library and with the community and the possibility to create one from a photo, everything is possible. The video editor is already quite complete so you can create most of your videos without using any other tool. Also, I have not yet been using is for personalized marketing but the potential there is enormous.

JoggAICreate engaging video ads with AI in minutes

4.0

Based on 20 reviews

Review JoggAI? [...] 4.0

Based on 20 reviews

Review JoggAI?

Reviewers mostly praise JoggAI for making video creation fast and simple, especially with avatars, photo or URL-to-video workflows, voice options, and useful tools for ads, podcasts, and short-form marketing content. They say it can save real production time, but several note weak spots: lip-sync can be inconsistent, generations can stall, editor controls are limited, and some voices, languages, and avatar diversity need work. A sharper concern comes from multiple lifetime-deal buyers, who accuse the company of changing credit terms after purchase and handling complaints poorly, which seriously hurts trust.
